name: Number Of Resource Creation Or Deployment Activities
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Azure Platform
when the event matches Operation Name (custom) is any of [MICROSOFT.COMPUTE/VIRTUALMACHINES/WRITE or MICROSOFT.RESOURCES/DEPLOYMENT/WRITE]
TD_list: APPLY Number Of Resource Creation Or Deployment Activities on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Azure Platform
AND when the event matches Operation Name (custom) is any of [MICROSOFT.COMPUTE/VIRTUALMACHINES/WRITE or MICROSOFT.RESOURCES/DEPLOYMENT/WRITE]
RED_list: Event name: Number Of Resource Creation Or Deployment Activities
Event description: Number of VM creations or deployment activities occur in Azure via the azureactivity log.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
Include detected events by "Username" from this point forward, in the offense, for 300 second(s)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
